entry.title: New: BILL053(25) (Honolulu) — PUBLISH
entry.content:
RELATING TO AFFORDABLE HOUSING.

Requires the construction of new affordable rental housing projects under ROH Chapter 32 to contain one parking stall for every two units within each project. Also requires a resident manager unit and employment of a resident manager. Resident manager units may not be counted towards the affordable rental unit requirement. Requires all project developers to make a presentation to the relevant neighborhood board.

Latest action: Public hearing notice published in the Honolulu Star-Advertiser.

View on the council site
